how_it_works: Base item types determine the implicit modifier, defense values, and crafting potential of an item. Choosing the right base is critical for endgame crafting — a T1 explicit on a bad base is worthless, while a mediocre explicit on a perfect base can be very valuable.
tips: Always check item level requirements — T1 mods require ilvl 86+ bases for most slots
Shaper/Elder/Conqueror bases have exclusive implicit pools that multiply crafting value
For rare item crafting, always start from an ilvl 85+ base to guarantee access to the best mod tiers
Check poe.ninja for current base prices — meta shifts can make previously cheap bases expensive overnight

bases.name: Hubris Circlet
bases.why_valuable: Highest ES helmet base in the game. Essential for ES builds that don't use a Bone Helmet.
bases.notes: Bone Helmet is preferred for minion builds. Hubris is the go-to for non-minion ES builds.

bases.name: Bone Helmet
bases.implicit: Minions have +X% to all Elemental Resistances (20-30%)
bases.why_valuable: Best-in-slot for minion builds due to the minion resistance implicit.
bases.notes: The implicit minion resistance is a massive defensive boost for any summoner.

bases.name: Eternal Burgonet
bases.why_valuable: Highest Armour helmet base. Essential for armour-stacking and melee builds.
bases.notes: Often used with Determination. Less popular than ES helmets in meta.

bases.name: Vaal Regalia
bases.why_valuable: Highest ES body armour base. The universal choice for ES-based characters.
bases.notes: Almost always the correct base for ES builds. No other ES body armour comes close to its base value.

bases.name: Astral Plate
bases.why_valuable: Implicit all-res is extremely valuable for crafting — frees up a mod slot or lets you skip resistance chasing.
bases.notes: The all-res implicit is unique among body armours and consistently makes this the best non-ES body armour base.

bases.name: Sadist Garb
bases.why_valuable: Highest combined Armour+Evasion body armour base. Core for hybrid defence builds.
bases.notes: Best base for the Determination + Grace combo and Glancing Blows/Acrobatics hybrid builds.

bases.name: Fingerless Silk Gloves
bases.implicit: Socketed Gems are Supported by Level X Faster Casting (5-8%)
bases.why_valuable: The implicit Faster Casting support saves a support gem socket — highly valuable for spellcasters.
bases.notes: The free Faster Casting implicit frees a gem socket in your main skill link. Essential for 5-link skill setups.

bases.name: Slink Gloves
bases.why_valuable: Highest Evasion gloves base. Core for evasion-focused builds needing maximum dodge chance.
bases.notes: Often combined with Grace aura. The high evasion base pairs well with Acrobatics keystone.

bases.name: Titan Gauntlets
bases.why_valuable: Highest Armour gloves base. Best base for melee armour builds.
bases.notes: Often outclassed by Shaper/Elder gloves with attack speed or crit implicit. Pure armour otherwise.

bases.name: Two-Toned Boots
bases.implicit: +X% to Fire and Cold Resistances OR Cold and Lightning OR Fire and Lightning (10-15%)
bases.why_valuable: Free double resistance implicit solves resistance problems in the boot slot, freeing mod space for offensive stats.
bases.notes: One of the most crafting-friendly bases in the game. The double-res implicit is worth more than higher base defense on most builds.

bases.name: Sorcerer Boots
bases.why_valuable: Highest ES boots base. Core for CI and ES builds prioritising defence over the Two-Toned resistance implicit.
bases.notes: Choose over Two-Toned Boots only when you have resistances capped via other slots.

bases.name: Stygian Vise
bases.why_valuable: The Abyssal Socket allows socketing an Abyss Jewel for extra stats. Universally the best belt base for most builds.
bases.notes: Near-universally BIS for non-unique belts. The Abyss Jewel in the socket typically provides more stats than any belt implicit.

bases.name: Crusader Gloves
bases.implicit: Trigger a Socketed Spell when you Attack (Crusader influence)
bases.why_valuable: The trigger implicit is used for CWDT-style setups without CD. Key for many complex builds.
bases.notes: A Crusader-influenced base. Trigger implicit allows complex skill interactions without cooldown restrictions.

bases.name: Two-Stone Ring
bases.implicit: +X% to Cold and Lightning Resistances OR Fire and Cold OR Fire and Lightning (12-16%)
bases.why_valuable: Best ring base for solving resistance problems — provides two resistances from a single implicit.
bases.notes: The go-to ring base for crafting. Choose variant based on which resistances you need most.

bases.name: Vermillion Ring
bases.implicit: Adds X to Y Physical Damage to Attacks
bases.why_valuable: Adds flat physical damage to all attacks. Best ring base for physical attack builds.
bases.notes: The implicit scales with attack speed and multiplies with physical damage bonuses.

bases.name: Opal Ring
bases.why_valuable: Highest elemental damage implicit of any ring. Best ring base for elemental attack or spell builds.
bases.notes: The implicit applies to both spells and attacks and scales all three elements simultaneously.

bases.name: Marble Amulet
bases.why_valuable: Life regeneration implicit is extremely powerful for builds that rely on regen as the main defence.
bases.notes: Near-mandatory for Righteous Fire builds where life regen directly enables the build to function.

bases.name: Citrine Amulet
bases.why_valuable: Dual stat implicit solves attribute requirements cheaply. Good base for crafting when stats are tight.
bases.notes: Very accessible and easy to craft due to low ilvl requirement. Best budget amulet base.

bases.name: Cerulean Ring
bases.why_valuable: Highest mana implicit on a ring. Key for mana-stacking builds (Indigon, Archmage, Mind Over Matter).
bases.notes: Best ring base for mana-intensive builds. The mana implicit stacks multiplicatively with +% maximum mana nodes.

bases.name: Sacrifice Quiver
bases.implicit: +X to Level of Socketed Bow Skill Gems
bases.why_valuable: The +gem level implicit scales the main bow skill's damage significantly without requiring a corrupted item.
bases.notes: Best quiver for bow skill scaling. The implicit is equivalent to 2 gem levels on your main skill.
